Testimonial Email

From: [You/Brand Name]

Subject Line: ANOTHER Client [Achieves Outcome]



Body

How’s your [day/evening/weekend] going?



[Mine/ours] is stellar!



[I’m/we’re] still buzzing about [client name]’s big win!



[Client achieved the reader’s desired outcome!]



[Photo]



[Explain that the client had every reason to give up/searched for a long time for a solution/common obstacles your client faces].



But he was able to achieve [outcome] without [negative]!



The secret?



[Product/Unique Mechanism/Feature].



Let’s give [Client] major props.



And if you’re inspired by their example..



[CTA to achieve the same outcome].



[Sign off]
